Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned across all process variants containing it
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Assigned and the end of the case

Name: Total time for Accepted + Assigned in cases that later include Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time for Accepted + Assigned when followed by Accepted + In Progress versus when followed by Completed + Resolved
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time from Accepted + Assigned to Completed + In Call in variants where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Total time between Accepted + Assigned and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average duration of Accepted + Assigned in variants that end with Completed + Closed compared to those ending with Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + Closed occurs

Name: Time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Accepted + Assigned in process variants that subsequently reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Elapsed time between Accepted + Assigned and Completed + Resolved in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Cycle time of Accepted + Assigned when it appears after a wait activity (e.g., Accepted + Wait - User, Accepted + Wait - Vendor, or Accepted + Wait - Implementation)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - User occurs

Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned in high-impact cases versus low-impact cases as recorded in the VINST incident management system
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case grouped by the last value of impact

Name: Total time from case start to Accepted + Assigned in variants that include Completed + In Call within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time between Accepted + Assigned and the subsequent Completed + In Call activity
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time of Accepted + Assigned when it directly precedes Accepted + In Progress in variants also containing Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time for Accepted + Assigned in variants with multiple occurrences of Queued + Awaiting Assignment before it
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment occurs

Name: Total resolution time contribution of Accepted + Assigned in end-to-end cases that feature Completed + In Call as an intermediate resolution step
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs
